unit.note: server 1534/1534 + client 1566/1566 (full suites, tsc --noEmit + oxlint clean both workspaces)

e2e.note: client/e2e/flows/campaign-attached-run-guard.spec.ts — seeds a real project + loop_state.json (in_progress unit) against an isolated single-process worktree stack; the REAL route computes attachedRun and both launch buttons render disabled + 'Run attached'.

surface_verification.runner: node client/node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/flows/campaign-attached-run-guard.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts (BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3850, isolated single-process stack: built client via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx server + temp USERPROFILE + SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local)
surface_verification.note: surface_verification.py orchestrator not used: the fixture requires a seeded loop_state.json + isolated temp-USERPROFILE stack the generic dev_server.py runner does not provision; the spec was driven directly against an equivalent isolated stack built from worktree source (production :3847 is a frozen dist without this change, so it cannot be used). 1 spec, 1 passed, exit 0.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1: readLoopAttachments joins a live in_progress sub_iterate unit to its campaign slug from spec_path (Windows backslash AND POSIX)
behaviors.evidence: server campaign-loop-state.test.ts — campaignSlugFromSpecPath (backslash/POSIX/no-segment) + 'returns the slug of a live in_progress sub_iterate unit (backslash path)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-2: readLoopAttachments returns the empty set for missing file / torn JSON / kind!=sub_iterate / no in_progress unit / stale started_at; conservative-live on missing started_at; env stale-window override
behaviors.evidence: server campaign-loop-state.test.ts — 6 ∅ cases + missing-started_at-conservative + SHIPWRIGHT_CAMPAIGN_ATTACH_STALE_MS override, 12/12 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-3: GET /api/campaigns sets attachedRun = (live loop unit) OR (status.json step in_progress); false when idle; torn loop_state never 500s (attachedRun false)
behaviors.evidence: server routes/campaigns.test.ts — 4 AC-3 cases (loop unit / status.json in_progress / idle false / torn→false+200) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-4: CampaignAutonomousLaunchButton disables + relabels 'Run attached' + explanatory tooltip when attachedRun; the confirm dialog cannot open
AC-5: CampaignStepLaunchButton disables + relabels when attachedRun; BOTH the direct-launch and the risky-step dialog paths are blocked
behaviors.evidence: client CampaignStepLaunchButton.test.tsx (plain + risky-step attached cases, title, no dialog) + E2E PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-6 regression: the triage Start-Campaign CTA stays 'Go to board' for an active campaign (never offers a second start while running)
behaviors.evidence: client CampaignStartCta.test.tsx — active→go-to-board (no start) + draft/null→start + complete→note PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-7: a producer-fix follow-up (mark sub-iterate in_progress in status.json) is filed in .shipwright/triage.jsonl
behaviors.evidence: triage.jsonl carries trg-9edbab4d (source=iterate, run-id stamped); verified via git diff origin/main

behaviors.behavior: Server-side enforcement: a fresh autonomous launch returns 409 campaign_run_already_attached when a live loop unit is attached (closes multi-tab / deploy-skew / direct-API)
behaviors.evidence: server campaign-branch.test.ts — '409 campaign_run_already_attached when a live loop unit runs for the slug' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Server-side enforcement: a fresh single-step launch returns 409 when a live loop unit is attached
behaviors.evidence: server campaign-step-branch.test.ts — '409 campaign_run_already_attached when a live loop unit runs for the campaign' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Crash recovery: a STALE in_progress loop unit (started_at older than the 6h window) does NOT block relaunch (200, not 409)
behaviors.evidence: server campaign-branch.test.ts — 'a STALE loop unit does NOT block relaunch (200)' PASSED
